completed_work: Added PLAN-20260706-0004 as a proposed plan in commit 75c92bf.
Added WARR-20260706-0007 and moved PLAN-20260706-0004 to admitted in commit 1ec99b0.
Regenerated SELF_MODEL.json and updated self-model tests for the admitted open plan state.
key_decisions: PLAN-20260706-0004 is admitted by WARR-20260706-0007 but not implemented.
The next implementation slice must connect CAP-0004 advisor output to context manifest diagnostics only, preserving selection_effect none.
next_actions: Implement admitted PLAN-20260706-0004 as a diagnostic-only context manifest integration with no selection, prompt, retrieval, embedding, index, memory-store, token-budget, reranking, or adapter side effects.
risks: Future implementation may accidentally be interpreted as automatic L0 inclusion unless diagnostics remain separate from ContextPackManifest.items and provider prompt construction.
summary_text: PLAN-20260706-0004 was proposed in commit 75c92bf and admitted in commit 1ec99b0 for context-manifest-connected L0 discovery advisor diagnostics. The slice remains governance-only so far: no implementation, capability, verification, provider prompt change, latest-context prompt path change, live retrieval, embedding creation, index mutation, memory-store mutation, token-budget behavior, non-none reranking, adapter behavior, automatic include_l0, or ContextPackManifest.items mutation was added. SELF_MODEL now records PLAN-20260706-0004 as admitted, open_plans = [PLAN-20260706-0004], admitted_plans includes PLAN-20260706-0004, plan_counts.completed = 4, plan_counts.admitted = 1, capability_counts.implemented = 4, and warrant_counts.supported = 9. Pre-commit checks for the admission slice were green: self-model tests 62 passed, full suite 359 passed, and audit_self_model_index returned ok true. The next governed step is implementation of the admitted diagnostic-only manifest integration, still preserving selection_effect none and advisory-only semantics.
